_comment: Edit this file to change any trading parameter. Re-run Section 2 of the notebook to apply.

tf_auto_stack._comment: When you pick an ENTRY_TF, these are the confirmation+bias TFs added above it automatically.

confidence_threshold._comment: Minimum % confidence to emit a signal. Lower = more signals, less reliable.

rr_ratio._comment: Risk-reward ratio. 2.0 means TP is twice as far as SL.

atr_sl_mult._comment: SL = entry +/- ATR x this value. Lower = tighter stop.

scan_interval_seconds._comment: How often the live monitor fetches new data (60 = every minute).

live._comment: Set to true to start the live scanner, false to stop it.
